task: okay, can you make a branch detailing those types of things that need to be done? I want to set up a branch for them to investigate. Make a single document in the docs directory. Make it a markdown file called the-matrix. Give a break down of how inference is used in this current implementation of the tool and what relevant paths would be needed to create a new ReviewProvider (don't call it FriendProvider). You basically need to give them enough detail/instruction to contribute this on their own. Switch to a new branch, name it k-labs. Create that markdown file and push it
